name: HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_DETAIL_
description: HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_DETAIL. This table stores vehicle incident event (Driver and Vehicle/ Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed Object) related data.

columns.Name: VEH_INC_EVT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: VEH_INC_EVT_DETAIL_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: VEH_INC_EVT_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: VEH_INC_EVT_SUMMARY_ID. Foreign key for HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_SUMMARY table.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_CLASSIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Classification of Vehicle Incident Event.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEH_EVT_CLASS_CODE.

columns.Name: COMPANY_VEHICLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Is this a Company Vehicle. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_VIN_NUM
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_VIN_NUM column : Vehicle Identification Number.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_LICENSE_PLATE_NUM
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_LICENSE_PLATE_NUM column : Vehicle License Plate Number.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_COMPANY_ID_NUM
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_COMPANY_ID_NUM column : Company ID Number If the Company Vehicle flag is Yes.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_REGISTRATION_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Registration country of the vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_REGISTRATION_STATE
columns.Comments: Registration state of the vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_MAKE
columns.Comments: Manufacturer of the vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_MODEL
columns.Comments: Model of the vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_MODEL_YEAR
columns.Comments: Model year of the vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_BODY_TYPE
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_BODY_TYPE: vehicle body type (eg VAN).Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEHICLE_BODY_TYPE

columns.Name: VEHICLE_GROSS_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_GROSS_WEIGHT: Gross Vehicle Weight.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_WEIGHT_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Gross Vehicle Weight.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_GVW_UOM

columns.Name: VEHICLE_REGISTERED_FLAG
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_REGISTERED_FLAG: Registered Vehicle (eg USDOT).Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_REGISTRATION_NUM
columns.Comments: Registration Number of the Vehicle.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_POSITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Position code of Vehicle at Time of Accident. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEH_POS.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_MOVEMENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Movement code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEH_MOV.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_AREA_IMPACT_CODE
columns.Comments: Area of Vehicle Receiving First Impact. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_IMPACT_LOC.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_TOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Is Vehicle Towed from Scene. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: TOWING_COMPANY_CONTACT_DETAIL
columns.Comments: Towing Company Contact Details.

columns.Name: DAMAGE_DESCR
columns.Comments: Description of the Damage(Vehicle/Animal or fixed object).

columns.Name: VEHICLE_HAS_AIRBAG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Airbag in vehicle. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: AIRBAG_DEPLOYED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Airbag deployed Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED
columns.Comments: Vehicle Speed.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Vehicle Speed. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPEED_UOM.

columns.Name: PERSON_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Person type. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_PERSON.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID of the Employee. This column will be blank if the person type is non employee.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Employee Assign ID of the Employee. This column will be blank if the person type is non employee.

columns.Name: NON_EMP_NAME
columns.Comments: Non employee name (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email ID of the person (Non employee: Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM
columns.Comments: Country code of the non employee(Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner) phone number.

columns.Name: PHONE_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: Area code of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner) phone number.

columns.Name: PHONE_NUM
columns.Comments: The phone number of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_LINE1
columns.Comments: Address Line1 of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_LINE2
columns.Comments: Address Line2 of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_CITY
columns.Comments: Address city of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_STATE
columns.Comments: Address State of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: Address Zip code of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: NON_EMP_ADDR_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Address Country of the non employee (Vehicle Driver/Pedestrian or Bicyclist/Animal or Fixed object Owner).

columns.Name: VEHICLE_DRIVERS_LICENSE_NUM
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_DRIVERS_LICENSE_NUM column : Drivers License Number.

columns.Name: DRIVERS_LICENSE_EXP_DATE
columns.Comments: DRIVERS_LICENSE_EXP_DATE column : Drivers License Date of Expiration.

columns.Name: STATE_ISSUED_DRIVERS_LICENSE
columns.Comments: State Issued Drivers License.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_DRIVER_LOCATION_CODE
columns.Comments: VEHICLE_DRIVER_LOCATION_CODE column : Driver Location at Time of Accident. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_DRIVER_LOC.

columns.Name: INJURED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Injured Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: TAKEN_TO_HOSPITAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Taken to Hospital Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: FATALITY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Fatality Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: CELL_PHONE_IN_USE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Cell Phone In Use Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: COMPUTER_IN_USE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Computer In Use Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: SEAT_BELT_IN_USE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Seat Belt in Use by Driver Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: ALCOHOL_TEST_PERFORM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Alcohol Test Performed Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: DRUG_TEST_PERFORM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Drug Test Performed Flag. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_HAS_PASSENGER_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column signifies whether there are any passenger(s) present in the Vehicle at the time of the event. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the Vehicle incident event is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
